description: This is a system generated manifest of files expected to be present in this zip. It can be safely deleted.

manifest.description: Train contains the target. This is the dataset that you will use to train your model.
Get started with this Python notebook and make your first submission.
This file provides a Challenge and Data Overview.
Test resembles Train.csv but without the target-related column. This is the dataset on which you will apply your model to.
A Python notebook that outputs a GeoTIFF file with specific climate variables.
Is an example of what your submission file should look like. The order of the rows does not matter, but the names of the "ID" must be correct.
